title: Create Sub-items via form allocated to specific item
excerpt: Hi Guys, I would like to add info (sub-items) to a relatively Static board (asset register).  Each asset would have a unique identifier and I would like to add sub-items (job cards) from time to time under these. Any sug…

posts.author: sean_pienaar (Sean)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Guys, I would like to add info (sub-items) to a relatively Static board (asset register). Each asset would have a unique identifier and I would like to add sub-items (job cards) from time to time under these. Any suggestions?
